scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm format:check && pnpm test
scripts.format: oxfmt --ignore-path .oxfmtignore --write package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json .oxfmtignore docs/adr packages/rpgmaker-event-dsl
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --ignore-path .oxfmtignore --check package.json pnpm-workspace.yaml tsconfig.base.json .oxlintrc.json .oxfmtrc.json .oxfmtignore docs/adr packages/rpgmaker-event-dsl
